tasks.description: Implement research-writer agent registration in orchestrator
tasks.context: Add research-writer to agent registry in backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts. Register with capabilities for research tasks, markdown generation, and content synthesis. Map to existing task complexity tiers.

review.summary: CEO resolved conflict (Codex approved, Claude rejected): REJECT — Claude's critical issue is valid. A file that cuts off mid-method (`isAgen`) is objectively incomplete and cannot be deployed. This isn't a nitpick about documentation or tests - it's a fundamental completeness failure that would break the orchestrator service. The task cannot be considered

issues.description: File is incomplete - cuts off at line with 'public isAgen' method declaration
Missing implementation for isAgentPaused method that is referenced in findCapableAgents
No test file provided for new orchestrator functionality
Missing JSDoc documentation for some public methods

strengths: Consistent registration pattern matching existing agents
Correct capabilities for research, markdown generation, and content synthesis
No markdown fences or invalid syntax in source files
Maintains existing complexity tiers and registry logic

tasks.description: Add smart skip logic to orchestrator task validation
tasks.context: Modify task selection in backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to skip tasks when agent unavailable or capability mismatch. Log skip reason, don't cascade. Return next viable task from queue.

tasks.description: Implement early rejection detection in task validator
tasks.context: Add pre-execution validation to backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts. Check file existence, complexity bounds, and agent capabilities. Reject invalid tasks before orchestrator assignment.
Instrument backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts with structured logging for task assignments, skips, rejections, and approval rates. Enable sprint success measurement at 70%+ target.
